creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
That version seems to have been maintained by the previous mantainer, there are also several repos on GitHub that provides several bugfixes and enhancements (or at least claim to do so).

https://github.com/inflex/alterMIME/pull/2
https://github.com/a1non2ymous/alterMIME
https://github.com/ac000/altermime/commits/fixs
https://github.com/somzoli/alterMIME
Debian also carries a few patches
https://sources.debian.org/patches/altermime/0.3.10-12/
